{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":375436,"duration_api_ms":375749,"ttft_ms":5332,"num_turns":45,"result":"Review complete for CP00-621.

**Verdict: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS** (no P0/P1/P2; one P3) — does not block pack or goal closeout from the reviewer's side.

The pack is a descriptor-only RP20 Data Room/VDR bridge (P04 UI tail → P05 fixture head, 150 units) that mirrors the committed CP00-620 pattern exactly. I independently verified, via read-only inspection:
- Deliverable distribution sums to exactly 150 across all 8 sections, matching code/manifest/baseline.
- No-write/no-real-data guards (including the 5 new CP621-specific runtime flags) enforced in code, contract JSON, and tests.
- Authority boundary intact (Claude read-only, not final approver; Hermes only for descriptor receipts, not product runtime).
- No overclaim — `production_ready=false`/`runtime_ready=false` honestly reported; evidence artifacts correctly pending.

The single P3 documents that flipping `production_ready` true still requires recorded validation-command evidence, the Hermes H20 gate, adjudication finalization, and human approval — process gates outside a read-only review's authority, not code defects.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"f62ce829-a078-4118-a6bf-55322d56b858","total_cost_usd":2.73487275,"usage":{"input_tokens":42,"cache_creation_input_tokens":159703,"cache_read_input_tokens":1972138,"output_tokens":29968,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":159703,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":407,"cache_read_input_tokens":153292,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7147,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":7147},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001":{"inputTokens":1145,"outputTokens":21,"cacheReadInputTokens":0,"cacheCreationInputTokens":0,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.00125,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000},"claude-opus-4-8":{"inputTokens":42,"outputTokens":29968,"cacheReadInputTokens":1972138,"cacheCreationInputTokens":159703,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":2.73362275,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"structured_output":{"overall_verdict":"PASS_WITH_FINDINGS","blocks_pack_closeout":false,"blocks_goal_closeout":false,"no_unresolved_p0":true,"no_unresolved_p1":true,"summary":"CP00-621 is a descriptor-only Data Room/VDR pack (RP20.P04.M04.S01-RP20.P05.M00.S10, risk C, 150 units) bridging the P04 UI secondary-workflow/permission-audit/fixture/test/Hermes/Claude/handoff descriptor tail into the P05 fixture-foundation head. Read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the implementation is complete and internally consistent across registry.js, service.js, validators.js, the contract JSON projections, the validator script, model.test.js, and the README CP00-621 entry. The CP621 binding, section rows, micro-titles, and deliverable distribution match the baseline manifest and prompt exactly; I independently re-derived all 150 row classifications and every deliverable count ties out (ui 59, implementation 39, claude_review 14, security_audit 14, fixture 12, test 6, hermes_evidence 6) and the 8 section row-counts tie out (22x5 + 20 + 10 + 10 = 150), so coverage validation is substantive rather than vacuous — the freezeCp621Result base populates every field the validator asserts. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are enforced in depth: the freeze chain sets all dispatches_*/executes_*/writes_*/reads_* guards false, the CP621 validator asserts ~45 such conditions including the new ui_state_snapshot/unauthorized_count_query/p05_fixture_foundation/golden_case/cross_tenant_fixture runtime guards, and the no_write_attestation is mirrored field-for-field in the contract JSON and asserted by tests. Authority boundary is preserved everywhere: claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; Hermes is used only for the deterministic descriptor evidence packet/receipt (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, descriptor-only receipt_shape) and is not embedded in product runtime. The pack makes no overclaim: manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor, and the closeout artifacts (command-evidence, claude-review-result, construction-inspection, adjudication) all honestly report pending; the changed-file-scope correctly isolates the active pack files from unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook/*, etc.). Review-hardening preconditions hold: readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, valid JSON), prompt 2397 bytes within limit, tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob, schema present, summary_only_review_allowed=false for this Risk C pack; no pre-existing raw-output/receipt exists for CP00-621 to reject. No P0/P1/P2 issues. One P3 informational note: production_ready closeout remains gated on recorded passing validation-command evidence, the Hermes H20 gate, adjudication finalization, and human final approval — process steps outside this read-only review's authority, not code defects. This review is independent and read-only; it is not final approval and does not assert enterprise trust.","findings":[{"id":"CP621-P3-01","severity":"P3","title":"Production-ready closeout still gated on un-recorded validation runs, Hermes gate, and human approval","file":"docs/closeout-packs/cp00-621/command-evidence.json","line":9,"details":"command-evidence.json reports status=pending with an empty commands array (line 9), no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false, and hermes_gate=pending (command_ids rp00_control_plane_contract_validate, spec_requirement_validate); gate_outcome=pending_pack_evidence_creation. claude-review-result.json (exactly_one_valid_pack_level_claude_review_run=false, valid_review_receipts=[]), construction-inspection.json (verdict=PENDING_REVIEW), and adjudication.md are likewise pending; manifest.json reports production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false. The CP621 descriptor implementation, contract projections, tests, validator script, and no-write/no-real-data + authority boundaries are complete and internally consistent (verified by read-only inspection plus independent deliverable-count math totalling 150). A read-only review can confirm the code is structured to satisfy the expected validation commands (npm test, npm run validate, npm run closeout-pack:validate, npm run rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check, etc.) but cannot confirm those commands were actually executed and passed, because no command evidence is recorded yet.","recommendation":"Before flipping production_ready to true, record passing evidence for the listed validation commands in command-evidence.json, complete the Hermes H20 gate, finalize adjudication and construction inspection, and obtain human final approval.
